title: Cheaper Anvil — 1-Level Cost
description: Anvil work is insanely expensive. Cheaper Anvil makes using an anvil more comfortable without breaking the XP system.
body:
# Cheaper Anvil

Anvil work is insanely expensive. Cheaper Anvil makes using an anvil more comfortable without breaking the XP system.

- No more "Too Expensive!" — removes the accumulated prior work penalty from items.
- Every successful anvil action costs 1 XP level (rename, repair, combine, apply enchanted books, etc.)

**Note:** You still need to have enough XP levels to perform the operation (usually a few levels).
However, the net cost will still be 1 level.

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer (no client install needed).

## Installation

### Singleplayer
1. Open your world folder: `.minecraft/saves/<your_world>/`
2. Put `CheaperAnvil_1.x.x.zip` into `datapacks/`
3. If the world is already loaded, reload it or run `/reload`

### Server
1. Put the zip into: `<server>/world/datapacks/`
2. Restart the server (or run `/reload`).
